why: Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound minecraft:server_links must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and official body generated by the oracle answer. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence for one official empty links list fixture only, not server-links UI behavior, trust/link-opening policy, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_server_links_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 16, official body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration clientbound packet id 0x10.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: ClientboundServerLinksPacket(List<ServerLinks.UntrustedEntry>), ClientboundServerLinksPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ClientboundServerLinksPacket), ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), ClientboundServerLinksPacket.links(), and ServerLinks.UNTRUSTED_LINKS_STREAM_CODEC.
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration clientbound server_links dispatch.
Current Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound mapping contains cookie_request id 0x00 through custom_report_details id 0x0f, but not server_links id 0x10.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0x10 in Clientbound Configuration; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Configuration clientbound server_links packet id 16
